CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-26-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE AUG-28-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-28-2019 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** KENNETH KWAN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER AT TRIAL CALL. THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO VACATE THE TRIAL DATE AND SET AN OSC IN 60 DAYS TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S ANSWER AND FILE A DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO DISMISS THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
